insight.headline: Customer API Changes
insight.what_changed: The Customer Account API's Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the Checkout type subtree are removed as of version 2026-10. This change affects apps using the Customer Account API to manage customer checkouts.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their app's code to ensure they are not relying on the removed fields. They should update their code to use alternative fields or APIs, such as the Storefront API or GraphQL Admin API, to manage customer checkouts. Additionally, developers should test their apps to ensure they are compatible with the updated API version.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience changes in how customer checkouts are managed, but the impact should be minimal if developers update their apps accordingly.
insight.why_it_matters: This change is important because it affects how customer checkouts are managed, and developers need to update their apps to ensure compatibility with the updated API version.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: The POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 now requires per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. Existing discounts must be updated to represent a per-unit discount.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now allows for more control over breaking changes to action configurations, reducing the likelihood of validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates action runtime URLs on every execution, eliminating the need for manual updates.
The CLI version 4.4.0 has been released with updates to Javy related dependencies and GCS bundle upload status validation.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify honest and transparent review practices for all apps.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout type subtree have been removed in Customer Account API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region markets in the Admin GraphQL API 2026-07.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, starting in API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated, starting in version 2026-07, and will be removed in a future version.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The Shop Minis May June 2026 update introduces new features, including product variant intents and typed hooks for selecting variants and sending buyers to express checkout.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market and vary rates by product and location.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0, making the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient and improving worker-specific resolve configuration.

recap.headline: Shopify updates impact GraphQL Admin API, Hydrogen, and Checkout UI extensions

themes.title: API Updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API 2026-07 now supports MarketRegionSubdivision and OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill. Additionally, the Customer Account API removes the Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field in version 2026-10.

themes.title: Checkout and POS Updates
themes.detail: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 requires per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, and the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07.

themes.title: App Store and Development Updates
themes.detail: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 is updated to clarify honest and transparent review practices, and the CLI is updated to version 4.4.0 with improvements to app updates and GCS bundle upload validation.

actions.text: Update POS UI extensions to use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Review and update apps to comply with Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3
Update Customer Account API usage to remove deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field
